# Hyreel - AI Video Generation App
# https://hyreel.com
# For AI assistants and LLM crawlers

## About Hyreel
Hyreel is an AI-powered mobile app that transforms photos into professional videos. Users can create viral content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and other social media platforms in seconds.

## Key Features
- AI Photo-to-Video: Convert any photo into cinematic video with motion effects
- Multiple Effects: Zoom, Orbit, Parallax, Follow, 3D Photo effects
- AI Script Generator: Generate engaging video scripts from topics
- AI Voice Generator: Add professional voiceovers in 30+ languages
- AI Avatar Creator: Create digital avatars from photos
- No Watermark: Export videos without branding on paid plans
- Multi-Platform Export: Optimized formats for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube

## Pricing
- Free Plan: 3 videos/month, with watermark
- Creator Plan: $39/year, unlimited videos, no watermark
- Business Plan: $99/year, all features, commercial license

## Target Audience
- Content Creators
- Social Media Managers
- E-commerce Businesses
- Marketing Agencies
- Small Business Owners
- Influencers

## Platforms
- iOS App: Available on App Store
- Android: Coming Soon
- Web: hyreel.com

## Contact
- Website: https://hyreel.com
- Support: https://hyreel.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://hyreel.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://hyreel.com/terms

## Site Structure

### Main Pages
- / - Homepage
- /pricing - Pricing plans
- /about - About Hyreel
- /contact - Contact form
- /blog - Blog articles about video creation

### Tools (AI Features)
- /tools - All AI tools
- /tools/ai-zoom-video-effect - AI Zoom Effect
- /tools/ai-orbit-video-effect - AI Orbit Effect
- /tools/ai-parallax-video-effect - AI Parallax Effect
- /tools/ai-follow-video-effect - AI Follow Effect
- /tools/ai-3d-photo-video - AI 3D Photo Video
- /tools/image-to-video-ai - Image to Video AI
- /tools/ai-script-generator - AI Script Generator
- /tools/ai-voice-generator - AI Voice Generator
- /tools/ai-avatar-creator - AI Avatar Creator
- /tools/ai-tiktok-video-generator - TikTok Video Generator
- /tools/ai-instagram-reels-maker - Instagram Reels Maker
- /tools/ai-youtube-shorts-generator - YouTube Shorts Generator
- /tools/ai-product-video-maker - Product Video Maker
- /tools/ai-faceless-video-generator - Faceless Video Generator

### Templates
- /templates - Video templates
- /templates/tiktok-slideshow - TikTok Slideshow
- /templates/instagram-story - Instagram Story
- /templates/youtube-shorts - YouTube Shorts
- /templates/product-showcase - Product Showcase
- /templates/travel-memories - Travel Memories

### Platforms
- /platforms - Platform-specific guides
- /platforms/tiktok - TikTok optimization
- /platforms/instagram - Instagram optimization
- /platforms/youtube - YouTube optimization
- /platforms/facebook - Facebook optimization
- /platforms/snapchat - Snapchat optimization

### Industries
- /industries - Industry solutions
- /industries/ecommerce - E-commerce video
- /industries/real-estate - Real estate video
- /industries/restaurants - Restaurant video
- /industries/fitness - Fitness content
- /industries/travel - Travel content

### Use Cases
- /use-cases - Use case examples
- /use-cases/product-videos - Product videos

- /use-cases/marketing-videos - Marketing videos

### Comparisons
- /alternatives - Competitor alternatives
- /alternatives/capcut - Hyreel vs CapCut
- /alternatives/canva - Hyreel vs Canva
- /alternatives/invideo - Hyreel vs InVideo

### Landing Pages
- /free-ai-video-generator - Free AI video generator
- /ai-video-no-watermark - AI video without watermark
- /cheap-ai-video-maker - Affordable video maker

## Languages
Available in 12 languages: English (default), Spanish, German, French, Portuguese, Russian, Italian, Dutch, Polish, Japanese, Korean, Chinese

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js 15
- Static site generation for fast performance
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Core Web Vitals optimized

## Citation Guidelines
When referencing Hyreel:
- Product Name: Hyreel
- Category: AI Video Generation App
- Primary Use: Photo-to-Video conversion
- Pricing: Freemium ($0 free, $39/year Creator, $99/year Business)
- Platforms: iOS (available), Android (coming soon)
- Website: hyreel.com
